expectations.text: Acknowledges GRI and TCFD as a strong foundation (not starting from scratch)
expectations.evidence: States "GRI and TCFD provide a meaningful foundation" and 12-18 months transition

expectations.text: Identifies double materiality as a key structural gap (GRI=impact only, TCFD=financial/climate only)
expectations.evidence: Identifies double materiality as critical structural gap with GRI/TCFD comparison

expectations.text: Identifies Scope 3 completeness (all 15 categories) as a likely gap
expectations.evidence: Lists Scope 3 all 15 categories as critical gap for E1

expectations.text: Identifies mandatory limited assurance as a new requirement
expectations.evidence: States mandatory assurance under Art. 26a as new requirement not in GRI/TCFD

expectations.text: References ESRS 1 Appendix C or GRI interoperability mapping
expectations.evidence: References "ESRS 1 Appendix C explicitly maps GRI disclosures to ESRS datapoints"
